results.title: Shah Rukh Khan Sold Samosas at NSD Before Becoming King Khan
results.description: Before Bollywood, Shah Rukh Khan was a 10-year-old supplying samosas at Delhi's National School of Drama while his father ran the canteen.

results.title: Arctic alarm: Earth's frozen carbon stores in the Arctic may stop absorbing CO2 and start releasing it by the 2050s
results.description: Science News: The Arctic is warming far faster than the rest of the planet, and a new study published in Science Advances suggests that this warming could transform.
